But if we consider Leonardo’s achievements as a pioneering craftsman and the unprecedented qualities of this work, the ‘Mona Lisa’ truly marked a turning point in portraiture. A masterpiece that set new standards in its day and which, five hundred years later, has become the very symbol of art.

programme.title: A special day
programme.desc: In this episode, we will spend a special day with Grégoire Lacroix, director of the antique decents department of the auction house, Aguttes. We meet him at the Hôtel Drouot in Paris, the largest auction house in the world. For several months, he has been working on two important sales and we are going to accompany him during the last hours of preparations.

programme.title: Masterpiece
programme.desc: A l'époque des fastes, Coorte passait des heures à travailler sur ses natures mortes austères composées d'une botte d'asperges, de trois pêches ou d'un bol de fraises. Comment se fait-il qu'il faille huit couleurs différentes pour approcher le blanc des asperges de Coorte ? Et pourquoi sont-elles si transparentes ? La recherche des réponses conduit l'équipe dans une petite église et chez un cultivateur d'asperges dans les provinces néerlandaises, ce qui conduit à une découverte spéciale dans un laboratoire de chimie.

programme.title: Private Tour
programme.desc: Private Tour takes you to discover the exhibition "Red, art and utopia in the land of the Soviets" at the Grand Palais in Paris. This exhibition focuses on how the communist project generated specific art forms throughout the Soviet period and more precisely from the October Revolution until the death of Stalin in 1953.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: « Les Tournesols » sont parmi les tableaux de Van Gogh les plus célèbres. Le musée Van Gogh à Amsterdam a consacré une exposition à ces œuvres et « Exhibition on screen », qui a eu un accès exclusif à l’événement, nous guide à travers l’exposition pour enquêter sur les mystères qui entourent ces tableaux. Le film nous amènera également à Tokyo, Philadelphie, Londres et Munich pour suivre les 5 principales œuvres de l’exposition.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.sub-title: Canaletto and the Art of Venice
programme.desc: Canaletto et l’art de Venise, un voyage en immersion dans la vie et l’art du célèbre peintre de Venise. Aucun artiste n’a su mieux capturer l’essence et le charme de cette ville que Giovanni Antonio Canal, plus connu sous le nom de Canaletto. La remarquable collection regroupe plus de 200 tableaux, dessins et eaux-fortes nous permet de partir à la découverte du talent artistique de Canaletto, de ses contemporains et de la ville qu’il a su reproduire avec génie. Le film ouvre également les portes de deux résidences royales officielles, Buckingham Palace et le château de Windsor, pour nous en apprendre plus sur l’artiste et sur Joseph Smith, l’homme qui a fait découvrir Canaletto à la Grande-Bretagne.

programme.title: Exhibition on Screen
programme.desc: Après deux ans d’exposition itinérante, en 2015 "La Jeune Fille à la perle” est retournée au musée Mauritshuis de La Haye. Du haut de ses 350 ans, l’éternelle Jeune Fille a toujours su conserver son aura de mystère et son charme. La preuve, c’est le nombre de curieux (1,2 millions) qui ont accouru pour l’apercevoir lors de son séjour au Japon. Le documentaire cherche à découvrir les nombreuses énigmes de cet extraordinaire tableau et de son créateur mystérieux - Vermeer. Qui était cette fille ? Pourquoi et comment Vermeer a-t-il peint ce tableau ? Venez voyager dans le temps pour découvrir Johannes Vermeer, visiter le charmant musée de La Haye et répondre à toutes ces questions.

programme.title: Art Quiz
programme.desc: Test your knowledge and your memory in fine arts, architecture, photography, street art and a dozen other topics with our Art Quiz popups !

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: Jean-François Millet (1814 - 1875) was a 19th-century French realist painter, pastellist, engraver and draughtsman. He is best known for his realistic rural scenes.

programme.title: Within the frame
programme.desc: François Boucher (1703-1770) is the archetypal French Rococo painter. He paints mythological themes tinged with gallantry, for example in the beautiful “Diane resting after her Bath” at the Louvre Museum. His patron was Madame de Pompadour, whose portrait he painted many times. Influenced by the Enlightenment movement, he devoted himself to Chinese themes (“The Chinese Garden”), to pastoral landscape (“Charms of Country Life”) and to a certain sensual Orientalism (“Brown Odalisque”).Enjoy your visit!

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two favourite Blue Peter presenters Sarah Greene and Peter Duncan are in the company of Natasha Raskin and Catherine Southon as they hunt for antiques around Surrey, Hertfordshire and North West London. Peter detours to learn how hockey became a popular sport the world over while keen aviator Sarah sees how the Battle of Britain was won. An incredible haul of antiques, including chimney pots, Pinocchio and a pair of African fertility figures, go under the gavel at an auction in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Photo Contest
programme.desc: In each episode of Photo Contest, two contestants compete on an imposed theme such as rock'n roll, Japan or architecture. They have one hour to take the best possible photographs before editing them for 30 minutes in a studio. The photographs they have selected are then presented to Agnès Grégoire, editor-in-chief of PHOTO magazine, who will have to choose the best photographer.

programme.title: Artist's Workshop
programme.desc: In the Artist's workshop series, we offer you a privileged meeting with an artist, or the discovery of an artist or an important place for the history of art. Whether they are painters, visual artists, sculptors... These people all have the same passion for art and this show is an opportunity to enter their different universes, to discover what drives them, inspires them and maybe that will give rise to vocations.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Italien painter, Leonardo da Vinci.You will discover his labour with the Joconde, Salvator Mundi, The Cène.

programme.title: An hour with
programme.desc: Take an hour break to discover the work of a Netherlands painter, Rembrandt.You will discover his labour with The night round, the return of the prodigal son, Danaé.

programme.title: Video Art
programme.desc: Street art, performances, digital art... Because the new forms of Art and their invigorating character, even iconoclastic, have been able to attract a new public until now refractory to go inside the interior of our beautiful museums.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her pastry chef friend Laurent Favre-Mot prepare desserts from our childhood. On the program: panettone in French toast, and torta della nonna with lemon cream and pine nuts, a typical Italian dessert!

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, nous allons voyager au Mexique avec les fajitas ! Un plat typique de la cuisine tex-mex. On va préparer ensemble des tortillas (galettes de maïs). Et pour la suite, des fajitas avec du poulet, des poivrons et des épices.

programme.title: Big Little Footprints
programme.desc: Join us on an epic adventure to a remote private island in Belize. As we spend our days catching lobsters, diving the worldclass reef and enjoying coconuts straight from the tree. We also learn about how much our tourism dollars really count.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: In a tranquil mountain monastery, Chef-Monk Jeong Kwan invites us into her world of mindful, intentional cooking. Her approach to food is rooted in simplicity, compassion, and a deep respect for nature. Together, we pick vegetables from the temple garden and learn why plant-based, seasonal eating has been central to Korean temple cuisine for generations.A highlight of the episode is learning the art of fermentation—from soy sauce aged in clay pots to rich, umami-packed bean pastes that require months or years to mature. Jeong Kwan explains that fermentation mirrors the human journey: slow, patient, and transformative.Cooking with her becomes a meditation, revealing that food prepared with intention nourishes not only the body but the spirit. This episode challenges us to rethink our relationship with ingredients, time, and the act of eating itself.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Japan - Okinawa - The Purpose of Life Part I
programme.desc: We travel to the Japanese island known for having some of the oldest people on Earth. We engage with leading scientists who have identified the "Longevity Gene," offering a glimpse into the genetic factors that contribute to extended lifespans. Beyond genetics, we explore the deeply ingrained cultural practices that sustain long, fulfilling lives in Okinawa. We delve into the importance of "moai," a lifelong social network that supports residents into their golden years, and the principle of "Hara Hachi Bu," which advises eating until you're 80% full while focusing on nourishing foods. But at the core of Okinawan longevity, we find "ikigai"—a profound sense of life purpose. From practicing martial arts to active community participation, we discover that Okinawan seniors maintain a vibrant sense of purpose in various facets of life. Join us on this enlightening journey to learn how the pillars of social support, mindful eating, and a strong sense of ikigai could enhance your ow.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: Our season begins in Guatemala with an ascent up the mighty Fuego Volcano, one of the most active volcanoes in the world. As we climb through loose ash and steep ridges, the powerful rumble beneath our feet reveals the dynamic relationship between humans and the natural forces that shape our planet. The climb becomes both a physical challenge and a reminder of the deep connection between environment and well-being.After the volcano, we descend into the world of ancient healing with a traditional Temazcal lodge, where Mayan practitioners guide us through a powerful cleansing ritual using steam, herbs, and ceremony. Inside the dark, humid chamber, the experience becomes a profound demonstration of how culture, community, and spirituality intersect with health.Our journey continues at a coffee plantation, where we learn how altitude, soil, and sustainable farming practices impact not only flavour, but also community health and economic stability. By the end of the episode, we reconnect.

programme.title: Big Little Footprints
programme.desc: Sometimes exploring the road less traveled gives you the biggest adventure. In this episode, we escape the city buzz and opt for a quieter life on a Texas dude ranch. Taking time to appreciate the beauty in history, animals and quality time as a family.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: In this inspiring episode, we join Team Broken Earth on a medical mission in Guatemala, witnessing firsthand the life-changing work taking place in local hospitals. From dawn until night, Canadian and Guatemalan healthcare teams perform surgeries, consult patients, and provide care that is often out of reach for many families.We meet patients of all ages—children awaiting orthopedic procedures, adults seeking mobility restoration, elders who have endured years of pain. Their stories highlight the profound need for global medical partnerships and the impact compassionate care can have on entire communities.Inside the operating rooms, surgical teams work with extraordinary precision, focus, and teamwork. Outside, families wait with hope and gratitude. This episode is a tribute to the power of service, cultural exchange, and the shared humanity that defines global health. Helping others, we learn, is one of the most powerful forms of healing.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Japan - Okinawa - The Purpose of Life Part II
programme.desc: We travel to the Japanese island known for having some of the oldest people on Earth. We engage with leading scientists who have identified the "Longevity Gene," offering a glimpse into the genetic factors that contribute to extended lifespans. But at the core of Okinawan longevity, we find "ikigai"—a profound sense of life purpose. From practicing martial arts to active community participation, we discover that Okinawan seniors maintain a vibrant sense of purpose in various facets of life. Join us on this enlightening journey to learn how the pillars of social support, mindful eating, and a strong sense of ikigai could enhance your ow.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.desc: At Lake Titicaca, we attend a Pachamama ceremony to honor the Earth. This stunning site faces threats from pollution and invasive species. This episode reminds us of our interdependence with nature and the urgent need to protect it.

Use this sequence to detoxify, build confidence and restore a sense of balance and wellbeing to take off the mat and into the rest of your day.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, Sabrina vous propose une séance explosive de cardio boxing. Après un échauffement complet des articulations, la team vous guide dans des enchaînements rythmés inspirés des sports de combat. C’est l’occasion idéale de travailler l’endurance, la coordination et la sangle abdominale tout en se défoulant. L’énergie est au rendez-vous, et l’ambiance fun rend l’effort encore plus motivant. Parfait pour relâcher la pression et faire le plein de vitalité !

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Reflect and Connect: Open Your Shoulders, Hips and Hamstrings
programme.desc: Are you ready to fly? Reflect and Connect will engage your whole body with a series of poses that first calm and center, and then awaken and inspire. Build energy and a sense of security before channeling your curiosity and testing your limits.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports.

programme.title: Home training
programme.sub-title: Fais ton Sport à la Maison
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, la team vous propose un training spécial haut du corps. Après un échauffement complet — chevilles, genoux, hanches, épaules et colonne — place à des exercices dynamiques pour muscler bras, dos et abdos. Le tout dans une ambiance fun et accessible, avec des conseils pour bien respirer et bouger sans se blesser. La coordination et la mobilité sont aussi au cœur de cette séance, idéale pour réveiller le haut du corps. Un moment sportif et motivant à vivre chez soi, à tout moment de la journée.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Revolve to Evolve: Twists, Balance and Hamstrings
programme.desc: A challenging and strengthening sequence, Revolve and Evolve seeks to reveal moments of relaxation in which truths can be more readily accessed. Use this sequence to detoxify, build confidence and restore a sense of balance and wellbeing to take off the mat and into the rest of your day.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today, it's in the restaurant business that Nathalie, this relentless businesswoman is evolving. With her husband, She has opened a chain of sushi restaurants, businesses that she runs like a charm. Nothing is left to chance for this keen decorator. In this adventure, Nathalie will be able to give free rein to her imagination as she has to completely redecorate an office on the theme of numbers and letters. So, as you can see, to win the competition, Nathalie is likely to give her rivals a run for their money.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Évelyne is an estate agent, but she also does interior design. Of course, she doesn't stop there. In any case, our Wonderwoman doesn't shy away, even when it comes to competition. She's like that, Évelyne, she says what she thinks, but she'll have to deal with the theme of “numbers and letters”. Our competitor has to redecorate the office of Sabine, who is far from a novice when it comes to decorating. Sabine is now a teacher, but she still has a pretty clear idea of the style she likes when it comes to interior design.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Nous entamerons ce périple près de la Rochelle pour en apprendre un peu plus sur l’élevage des fameuses moules de bouchot mais aussi une technique bien particulière pour les cuisiner. Nous partirons ensuite pour un tour de France des meilleures huîtres : direction Cancale, Arcachon, Montpellier et enfin Oléron pour connaître les différentes méthodes d’élevage et s’y retrouver un peu plus parmi toutes les espèces de l’hexagone. Julie cuisinera une fricassée de berniques, les petits chapeaux chinois qui recouvrent les rochers du littoral mais aussi des palourdes roses méconnues du grand public. Nous poursuivrons notre route dans le Finistère pour rencontrer Sylvain, le seul éleveur d’ormeau du pays puis à Méru où se trouve encore des ateliers magnifiant ce sublime matériau. Le Chef Jean-Marie Baudic nous cuisine les coquilles Saint-Jacques comme personne.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: What will they think of their new interior? How many points will they award? Their score could change everything and completely overturn the current rankings. The final hope for our decorators is to be Valérie Damidot's favourite and win a bonus point. So who will win the competition? Who will walk away with €2,000 and the title of decorating ace? Today is the day of the grand final, before we see the reaction of the owners and find out their scores. Each contestant will find out what the other contestants thought of their decorating choices.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Let's hit the roads of France to discover shellfish. We'll visit Brittany, then the Normandy coast where fishing is the regional sport, and Corsica, where the far northeast of the island lives to the rhythm of lobster. Julie takes us to cook lobster, crab with a very special recipe, and langoustines.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... We'll cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. We'll then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, we'll discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: C'est à Giverny que démarre le voyage de Julie, celui dont le nom résonne immédiatement comme le berceau de l’Impressionnisme a gardé une authenticité émouvante, Giverny impose son style, murmure son histoire. Sa notoriété est fortement liée à la présence historique de Claude Monet et à tous les fabuleux témoins laissés par ce dernier. Claude Monet a aussi laissé son empreinte dans la cuisine à Giverny. Ses carnets de recettes sont là pour en témoigner. C’est dans ces carnets que Julie va s’inspirer pour remplir le sien, au menu : Lapin en compote, feuilleté d’andouilles au camembert, et charlottes aux abricots.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is in the heart of the Sarthe that Julie begins her new tour. Located in the Pays de la Loire region, the Sarthe department is the gateway to the French Grand Ouest. In the Haut Maine region, Le Mans is a city of art as well as a historic city, which played a decisive role in the development of the automobile. The country of Le Mans is distinguished by the diversity of its heritage, having kept in its stones the imprints of all eras. This region is notably renowned for its poulet de Loué, its capon and many other regional specialities. Let's go for a real Sarthe gourmet journey, with veal rouelles à la mancelle, roast poularde and seasonal fruit tart.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie is offering you a trip to the south of France. Between the Rhone Valley and the Mediterranean, let's discover a fruit that is harvested in November: the olive.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie prend la direction de la Bourgogne pour découvrir des races anciennes de volaille réintroduites en France grâce au travail de l’éleveur Fred Ménager. Nous nous rapprocherons ensuite de l’Auvergne pour découvrir comment est attribué le fameux Label Rouge et le rôle des organismes certificateurs … car il est important de savoir ce qui atterri dans nos assiettes. Julie se rendra aussi dans la Drôme pour cuisiner de la pintade avant de se diriger vers le Périgord pour préparer un civet de dindon. Installée dans sa petite Micheline, Julie remontera ensuite vers le centre pour découvrir un étonnant fabricant de mouche qui utilise des plumes de coqs !

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrénées Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte d'Azur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While we're all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes you on a bread trail to uncover the dedicated artisan bakers and millers. Her adventure will lead her through the Libourne region, then onwards to the North of France, the Ardèche, and the Aisne, where bakers have transformed bread into a powerful catalyst for social cohesion. While some individuals may avoid bread, particularly due to gluten-related concerns, others have chosen to reposition it at the forefront of the dining experience by championing its nutritional benefits. This commitment is shared by several chefs whom Julie will meet at the conclusion of her expedition.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana cuisine avec l'interprète du titre phare de La Reine des Neiges : Anaïs Delva. Ensemble, elles vont préparer deux recettes 100% végétariennes, philosophie adoptée par la chanteuse. Au menu : fettucini de courgettes grillées, haricots blancs au pesto et burger végétarien. Comme quoi, il est possible de se régaler avec des plats végétariens sans rester sur sa faim !

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, Luana Belmondo cuisine un poisson de la Méditerranée, le rouget. Au menu : filets de rouget avec de la purée d'avocat et des carottes au cumin, et mille-feuille de rouget avec des légumes printaniers.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: The Pays d'Auge is the beating heart of Normandy. Honfleur with its picturesque port, the Basilica of Lisieux, a major pilgrimage site, and the Haras du Pin, the cradle of horse breeding, illustrate the diversity of this land of traditions, where craftsmanship and gastronomy reign supreme.

programme.title: Health Explored with Mike Wahl
programme.sub-title: Japan - Okinawa - The Purpose of Life Part I
programme.desc: We travel to the Japanese island known for having some of the oldest people on Earth. We engage with leading scientists who have identified the "Longevity Gene," offering a glimpse into the genetic factors that contribute to extended lifespans. Beyond genetics, we explore the deeply ingrained cultural practices that sustain long, fulfilling lives in Okinawa. We delve into the importance of "moai," a lifelong social network that supports residents into their golden years, and the principle of "Hara Hachi Bu," which advises eating until you're 80% full while focusing on nourishing foods. From practicing martial arts to active community participation, we discover that Okinawan seniors maintain a vibrant sense of purpose in various facets of life. Join us on this enlightening journey to learn how the pillars of social support, mindful eating, and a strong sense of ikigai could enhance your ow.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: Charente-Maritime is a 500-kilometer coastline that conceals an unsuspected heritage. From La Rochelle and its fortified port to the Ile de Ré and its salt marshes, to Talmont-sur-Gironde, a medieval village perched on the estuary, this region reveals itself through the tides and encounters. An immersion between maritime traditions and historical relics.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Balanced Being: Open Your Hips and Strengthen Your Arms & Upper Back

A study of complimentary opposites, this practice will challenge you to find the balance within the opposition.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, la team vous plonge dans une séance fitness à l’ancienne, fun et dynamique. On commence par un échauffement complet : chevilles, genoux, hanches, colonne… tout y passe pour préparer le corps. Ensuite, place à une série de mouvements inspirés du fitness rétro, rythmés par la musique et la bonne humeur. La coordination et le cardio sont au rendez-vous, avec une ambiance conviviale et des blagues pour garder le sourire. Un super moment à partager en famille ou entre amis, pour bouger sans pression.

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses!

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Balance and Bend: Balance and Connect
programme.desc: Stand tall and find your truest state of focus and center with this balancing flow. Use the breath to align your posture and learn to experience your practice, rather than thinking it through. Asanas, the physical yoga poses, then become a practice of feeling more than a mental exercise.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: It's off for a new week of competition. But before the four amateur decorators take it in turns to battle it out with paintbrushes and nails, they have a meeting in the Brussels workshop. It's an opportunity to gauge their opponents and the first contender for the title of decorating ace. And here he is. Guillaume, 37, manager of a concept store in Brussels, sits quietly on the sofa. He's a big kid with a passion for contemporary art, which he studied for five years. And the artist of the day has his own vision of the week's theme, right at home in his bubble.

programme.title: Home training
programme.sub-title: Fais ton Sport à la Maison
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, la team vous propose un training spécial haut du corps. Après un échauffement complet — chevilles, genoux, hanches, épaules et colonne — place à des exercices dynamiques pour muscler bras, dos et abdos. Le tout dans une ambiance fun et accessible, avec des conseils pour bien respirer et bouger sans se blesser. La coordination et la mobilité sont aussi au cœur de cette séance, idéale pour réveiller le haut du corps. Un moment sportif et motivant à vivre chez soi, à tout moment de la journée.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie nous donne rendez-vous à Bordeaux après avoir arpenté le pays de Blaye, visité deux fois le bassin et parcouru les terres du Libournais à deux reprises, il fallait bien s’arrêter un jour dans la capitale du Bordelais ! N’y-a-t-il pas meilleure saison que le mois de septembre pour découvrir la perle d’Aquitaine, plus souvent appelée « Cité du vin » ? Julie donne rendez-vous à ces habitants pour découvrir les traditions mais aussi les projets plus récents de cette ville chargée d’Histoire et de gastronomie.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Revolve to Evolve: Twists, Balance and Hamstrings
programme.desc: A challenging and strengthening sequence, Revolve and Evolve seeks to reveal moments of relaxation in which truths can be more readily accessed. Use this sequence to detoxify, build confidence and restore a sense of balance and wellbeing to take off the mat and into the rest of your day.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: We are in the middle of the harvest season, a perfect opportunity to discover the most beautiful French vineyards.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Today, it's in the restaurant business that Nathalie, this relentless businesswoman is evolving. With her husband, She has opened a chain of sushi restaurants, businesses that she runs like a charm. Nothing is left to chance for this keen decorator. In this adventure, Nathalie will be able to give free rein to her imagination as she has to completely redecorate an office on the theme of numbers and letters. So, as you can see, to win the competition, Nathalie is likely to give her rivals a run for their money.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Julie prend la direction de la Bourgogne pour découvrir des races anciennes de volaille réintroduites en France grâce au travail de l’éleveur Fred Ménager. Nous nous rapprocherons ensuite de l’Auvergne pour découvrir comment est attribué le fameux Label Rouge et le rôle des organismes certificateurs … car il est important de savoir ce qui atterri dans nos assiettes. Julie se rendra aussi dans la Drôme pour cuisiner de la pintade avant de se diriger vers le Périgord pour préparer un civet de dindon. Installée dans sa petite Micheline, Julie remontera ensuite vers le centre pour découvrir un étonnant fabricant de mouche qui utilise des plumes de coqs !

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: Évelyne is an estate agent, but she also does interior design. Of course, she doesn't stop there. In any case, our Wonderwoman doesn't shy away, even when it comes to competition. She's like that, Évelyne, she says what she thinks, but she'll have to deal with the theme of “numbers and letters”. Our competitor has to redecorate the office of Sabine, who is far from a novice when it comes to decorating. Sabine is now a teacher, but she still has a pretty clear idea of the style she likes when it comes to interior design.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Si l’été est la saison où les légumes abondent au potager, il serait dommage de ne pas savourer ceux que les saisons plus fraîches nous offrent : potages, tourtes, potées ou gratins mettent à l’honneur des légumes de saisons, idéals pour se réchauffer. Pour débuter ce nouveau voyage, un légume qui trônait déjà sur les tables de la Grèce Antique : le salsifis que Julie cuisinera avec une drôle de tourtière…L’hiver c’est aussi la saison du chou alors direction la Champagne pour y apprendre la recette de la potée locale qui devrait remplir le ventre d’un grand nombre de convives.Ce petit tour de France nous emmènera aussi à la découverte d’orfèvres du maraîchage qui sculptent légumes et fruits d’hiver, et vous présentera différentes techniques et méthodes pour sublimer vos potagers.

programme.title: Deco Masters
programme.desc: What will they think of their new interior? How many points will they award? Their score could change everything and completely overturn the current rankings. The final hope for our decorators is to be Valérie Damidot's favourite and win a bonus point. So who will win the competition? Who will walk away with €2,000 and the title of decorating ace? Today is the day of the grand final, before we see the reaction of the owners and find out their scores. Each contestant will find out what the other contestants thought of their decorating choices.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, we're off to discover summer fruits, which are harvested from June to August: peaches, melons, strawberries, raspberries... We'll then head to the cherry capital, Céret, and cook blueberries, strawberries and an apricot charlotte.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Honey was the first sweet condiment in history! It has also been known and consumed as a remedy since Antiquity. In France, we find an infinite variety of honey: acacia, chestnut, fir, rosemary, orange, spruce, oak, linden or lavender... We'll cross forests, fields and even towns, as bees also forage in urbanized areas. We'll then cook up emblematic recipes like Vercel gingerbread. Finally, we'll discover the European dark bee. Protecting this 80-million-year-old bee has become the spearhead of some passionate beekeepers.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo and her pastry chef friend Laurent Favre-Mot prepare desserts from our childhood. On the program: panettone in French toast, and torta della nonna with lemon cream and pine nuts, a typical Italian dessert!

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, nous allons voyager au Mexique avec les fajitas ! Un plat typique de la cuisine tex-mex. On va préparer ensemble des tortillas (galettes de maïs). Et pour la suite, des fajitas avec du poulet, des poivrons et des épices.

programme.title: Earth from Above
programme.sub-title: Défendre l’eau c’est défendre la vie - Partie 1
programme.desc: The oceans cover more than 70% of the Earth's surface. The sea is the largest natural environment on our planet and remains virtually unexploited. In Brittany, in the Seven Islands. Then in the Bay of Saint-Brieuc, in the middle of a sea of green algae. In Brittany, intensive agriculture has developed over the last thirty years. In New Caledonia, the coral reef is the second largest in the world and could be threatened by the construction of a nickel mine. In Normandy, in the Botanical Garden of Vauville, an extraordinary garden has plants from all over the world. Also in the Archipelago of Chausey in Normandy with the highest tides in Europe. Or the Mont Saint Michel. As a result of silting up and man-made works, the Mont was no longer an island. In Italy, in Venice, on the verge of drowning, major development work, industrialisation and tourism have upset the environment. In New Caledonia, flying over the heart of Voh is surrounded by the largest lagoon in the world. 24,000 km2 prot.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: It is in the heart of the Sarthe that Julie begins her new tour. Located in the Pays de la Loire region, the Sarthe department is the gateway to the French Grand Ouest. In the Haut Maine region, Le Mans is a city of art as well as a historic city, which played a decisive role in the development of the automobile. The country of Le Mans is distinguished by the diversity of its heritage, having kept in its stones the imprints of all eras. This region is notably renowned for its poulet de Loué, its capon and many other regional specialities. Let's go for a real Sarthe gourmet journey, with veal rouelles à la mancelle, roast poularde and seasonal fruit tart.

programme.title: Home training
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode de Fais ton Sport à la Maison, la team vous plonge dans une séance fitness à l’ancienne, fun et dynamique. On commence par un échauffement complet : chevilles, genoux, hanches, colonne… tout y passe pour préparer le corps. Ensuite, place à une série de mouvements inspirés du fitness rétro, rythmés par la musique et la bonne humeur. La coordination et le cardio sont au rendez-vous, avec une ambiance conviviale et des blagues pour garder le sourire. Un super moment à partager en famille ou entre amis, pour bouger sans pression.

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Namaste Yoga
programme.sub-title: Balanced Being: Open Your Hips and Strengthen Your Arms & Upper Back
programme.desc: Balanced Being is a powerful, flowing sequence that creates presence and strength. Use this practice to root down, then rise up with confidence and a centered, balanced energy. A study of complimentary opposites, this practice will challenge you to find the balance within the opposition.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: If you're a nature enthusiast and a fan of outdoor cooking, the upcoming season is perfect for barbecue enthusiasts! Our journey will take us to Aube, nestled in the heart of the Brévonnes forest, and then to the Massif des Bauges, where grilling and snow create a unique combination. Afterward, we'll explore the Libournais region, where we'll uncover cooking techniques that make use of vine shoots, which are plentiful in the area. Just a short distance from the vineyards, we'll arrive at another corner of Gironde, the Blaye region, where the cooking method remains consistent but features a distinctly local ingredient: eel.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook
programme.desc: Today, Julie takes us down a different kind of yellow-brick road, one that tastes of childhood and gourmet delights: the road of sweets. France may be famous for its gastronomy, but it's not to be outdone when it comes to pastries and confectionery - quite the opposite. “Bêtises” from Cambrai, "Berlingots” from Carpentras, "Calissons” from Aix-en-provence, every region in France has its own sweet or confectionery.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Dans cet épisode, Luana Belmondo reçoit Delphine Malachard, qui est intolérante au gluten. Ensemble, elles vont donc cuisiner des recettes sans gluten. Au menu : soufflé au chocolat et financiers à la vanille et aux fruits rouges.

programme.title: Luana's Kitchen
programme.desc: Luana Belmondo cuisine la reine des protéines végétales : la lentille. Bonne pour la santé, digeste et délicieuse, elle remplace la viande et le poisson. Nous allons préparer des galettes de lentilles corail aux épices, avec une sauce au yaourt et à la menthe. Et pour la suite, un classique de la cuisine française : une salade de lentilles vertes avec de la saucisse de Morteau.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela goes to the Downtown Dubai Farmer's Market with chef Silvena Rowe to pick out fresh ingredients. Silvena will present her restaurant Omnia Gourmet, where you can taste delicious gluten-free vegan cuisine. Then, Gabriela will enjoy a catamaran lesson at the Sofitel in Palm Jumeirah.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela begins her day with an intense workout on the beach at Nikki Beach Resort with Ella, her fitness trainer. She then participates in a surf lesson with Carlo and his friends, before sampling delicious Caribbean recipes with Chef Olivier Key West.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela gets up early to head to the desert where she will take horseback riding lessons with her friend Danielle. She will then go to the Rixos The Palm to enjoy the spa and aqua fitness. She will also try the Kangoo Jumping, before tasting the Mediterranean cuisine of the restaurant El Chiringuito with the chef Diego.

programme.title: 100 Places to See
programme.desc: Charente-Maritime is a 500-kilometer coastline that conceals an unsuspected heritage. From La Rochelle and its fortified port to the Ile de Ré and its salt marshes, to Talmont-sur-Gironde, a medieval village perched on the estuary, this region reveals itself through the tides and encounters. An immersion between maritime traditions and historical relics.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: Gabriela enjoys her day at The Retreat Wellness Hotel. She meets with Dr. Grace for a preliminary wellness consultation. Then she tries out the wellness cuisine with Chef Pat, before taking an Eco Gulf class at the beach with her friend. She ends her day with a sunset yoga session.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: In this episode, Gabriel will start her day with some vegan cuisine. She will experience facial yoga at the Life'n'One holistic wellness center, before meeting Katrin from Active Escapes for a Wake surfing session in Dubai Marina.

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: My Day Dubai
programme.desc: In this episode, our host Gabriela will take us to the Grand Hyatt Hotel. In the morning, she will take tennis lessons. Then she will have a cooking class to discover the Italian recipes of the hotel's chef. She will also enjoy relaxing treatments at the spa in the hotel's green park.

programme.title: Massages

programme.title: Audio Advice
programme.desc: Relax and refocus with our thematic audio advices, set against the most beautiful backdrops in the world.

programme.title: Afrikas jegere
programme.desc: Nsefu-flokken med løver lever ved bredden av Luangwaelva i Zambia, der en erfaren løvinne oppdrar ungene.

programme.title: Afrikas jegere
programme.desc: To hannløver, nært knyttede tvillingbrødre, har ledet Nsefu-stammen i tre år og beskyttet området deres mot fiender.

programme.title: Kalahari – Africa's Underground Desert
programme.desc: Kalahari holdes i live av et hemmelig samfunn av skapninger under jorden.

programme.title: Africa's Wild Geniuses
programme.desc: På tvers av Afrikas ugjestmilde landskap kreves det kreativitet for å overleve. I ørkenen lærer surikatene sine små å jakte, mens hjulspinnere ruller over sanddynene på jakt etter bytte. På savannen må sekretærfugler, gjødselbiller og thomsongaseller stole på instinktene sine for å overleve. Og dypt inne i skogen viser fingerdyr og kameleoner sine ferdigheter for å overleve.

programme.title: Afrikas jegere
programme.desc: To hannløver, nært knyttede tvillingbrødre, har ledet Nsefu-stammen i tre år og beskyttet området deres mot fiender.

programme.title: Land of the Iberian Lynx
programme.desc: For pantergaupa bringer vårregnet håp i den ulendte elvedalen Jandula. Her er livet hardt for disse sky kattedyrene, men hunngauper må i tilegg oppdra ungene sine. Vi ser hvordan pantergaupene kjemper om å overleve under tøffe forhold, fra spennende jakt til foreldrerollens ømme øyeblikk.

programme.title: Kalahari – Africa's Underground Desert
programme.desc: Kalahari holdes i live av et hemmelig samfunn av skapninger under jorden.

programme.title: Africa's Wild Geniuses
programme.desc: På tvers av Afrikas ugjestmilde landskap kreves det kreativitet for å overleve. I ørkenen lærer surikatene sine små å jakte, mens hjulspinnere ruller over sanddynene på jakt etter bytte. programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Naturreservatet Papahanaumokuakea strekker seg over de nordvestre øyene til Hawaii.

programme.title: United States of Animals
programme.desc: I USA finner noen av de mest fascinerende migrasjonene sted nærmere enn du tror, mange av dem i din egen bakgård. Fra kanadatraner i Nebraska til monarksommerfugler i California, dyrene pakker kofferten og reiser hvert år for å slå seg ned i nye hjem, og noen av disse migrasjonene kan finne sted i hjembyen din. Denne feltguiden viser hvor du kan oppleve noen fantastiske migrasjoner.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: Hvaler, pingviner og sjøløver, som føder unger her, er blant sjødyrene som tiltrekkes av Argentinas 5000 km lange kyststripe. Fra første åndedrag er det én ting som gjelder for ungene: å overleve. Spekkhuggere jakter på unge sjøløver med en spesiell teknikk, mens måker angriper hvalungene. Vi får se dyrenes utrolige adferd gjennom noen fantastiske opptak under vann, noe som gjør Christian Baumasters film til en stor visuell opplevelse.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Vi reiser fra sør til nord og utforsker de fjerneste avkrokene til Appalachian Trail og møter forskerne som jobber for å bevare området.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Vi følger med JT Reynolds, Death Valleys store forkjemper, for å møte forskerne som jobber for å bevare det unike stedet.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: Hvaler, pingviner og sjøløver, som føder unger her, er blant sjødyrene som tiltrekkes av Argentinas 5000 km lange kyststripe. programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Dr. Ferguson og Dr. Hodges samarbeider for å redde en kaninunge som har blitt angrepet av familiens katt; legene utfører et keisersnitt på en bulldogg, og sykehuset yrer av aktivitet mens alle hjelper til med å gjenopplive valpene.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa
programme.sub-title: Rhinos, Koalas and Bears... Oh My!
programme.desc: Forelsk deg i asiatiske og australske dyr i Zoo Tampa! I denne spesialepisoden har en malayabjørn time hos tannlegen, et par treleoparder utforsker sitt nye habitat, dyreparken tar farvel med en elsket koala og et neshornpar blir forelsket.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Det er fullt kaos hos Pol Vet! Dyrlegen assisterer en ung hoppe som føder og dr. Lisa behandler en grand danois med et hovent ansikt. Geiter med koksidiose kjemper for livet og en løskatt vil ikke behandles. En katt er full av luft, en gris har mistet hengemagen. En svart labrador har et illeluktende problem. Bråkete angus-kveg får svangerskapskontroller og vinteren kommer til Michigan.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Etter knall og fall redder dr. Pol og veterinærene alt fra gekkoer til geiter på klinikken. En gris med prolaps, en haug med valper og en kommende veterinær holder hjulene i gang. Dr. Pol behandler en dachs som har vært i slåsskamp, dr. Lisa bistår en geit med fødselen og dr. Nicole fjerner spikeren i hoven til en hest. Så får Pol-familien gledelige babynyheter.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: PVS-staben sørger for at alle dyr har en sjanse. I denne episoden av The Incredible Dr. Pol ser du alt fra bitte små valper og kaniner til store kuer og hester og krypdyr, og det er en artig blanding av "ååå

programme.title: Ville Chile
programme.desc: I Sør-Amerika fører vestavindsbeltet til nedbør som legger forholdene til rette for regnskogen i Valdivia som dekker den neotropiske faunaregionen.

programme.title: Ville Chile
programme.desc: Chile er en stripe av land fanget mellom fantastiske naturlige grenser. I nord stenger verdens tørreste ørken landet av fra resten av Sør-Amerika. I Atacama-ørkenen har dyrelivet brukt millioner av år på å tilpasse seg et liv uten vann. De som overlever har lært at ingen muligheter kommer uten en viss risiko, men bare de av dyrene i Atacama som tør å ta sjanser, overlever i den mest ugjestmilde ørkenen på jorden.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: Nord i Argentina finnes Ibera-reservatet med sumper, laguner og et like stort biologisk mangfold som i Pantanal.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: Hvaler, pingviner og sjøløver, som føder unger her, er blant sjødyrene som tiltrekkes av Argentinas 5000 km lange kyststripe. Fra første åndedrag er det én ting som gjelder for ungene: å overleve. Spekkhuggere jakter på unge sjøløver med en spesiell teknikk, mens måker angriper hvalungene. Vi får se dyrenes utrolige adferd gjennom noen fantastiske opptak under vann, noe som gjør Christian Baumasters film til en stor visuell opplevelse.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: I Argentinas fantastiske, men tøffe villmark må dyrene kjempe for å overleve hver eneste dag. Terrenget er karrig og ulendt, lufta er tynn og været kan endre seg på et blunk. En puma sniker seg gjennom dalføret på jakt etter en guanako, mens en tarantell forsvarer seg mot et sultent beltedyr. Revene spiser av byttene de finner inntil en stor rovfugl dukker opp. Samtidig holder isbreene på ferskvannet som dyrene så sårt trenger.

programme.title: United States of Animals
programme.desc: Hvert år finner det sted store matbonanzaer i USA, og mange dyr reiser fra kyst til kyst for å stille sulten. Fra millioner av møllspisende flaggermus i Texas til hvithodehavørner som kjemper om fisk i Maryland, disse dyrene vet akkurat hvor de skal dra for å få det de vil ha på menyen. Reisene etter mat lønner seg, og noen av disse matbonanzaene kan være nærmere enn du tror. Er du nysgjerrig på å lære mer, vil denne feltguiden vise hvor du kan finne en matbonanza i nærheten av deg.

programme.title: Utemmede Amerika
programme.desc: Reis over 160 000 km langs den amerikanske kystlinja fra iskalde arktiske farvann til den idylliske varmen i Det karibiske hav.

Dr. Pol behandler en dachs som har vært i slåsskamp, dr. Lisa bistår en geit med fødselen og dr. Nicole fjerner spikeren i hoven til en hest. Så får Pol-familien gledelige babynyheter.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: PVS-staben sørger for at alle dyr har en sjanse. I denne episoden av The Incredible Dr. Pol ser du alt fra bitte små valper og kaniner til store kuer og hester og krypdyr, og det er en artig blanding av "ååå

programme.title: United States of Animals
programme.desc: Hvert år finner det sted store matbonanzaer i USA, og mange dyr reiser fra kyst til kyst for å stille sulten. Fra millioner av møllspisende flaggermus i Texas til hvithodehavørner som kjemper om fisk i Maryland, disse dyrene vet akkurat hvor de skal dra for å få det de vil ha på menyen. Reisene etter mat lønner seg, og noen av disse matbonanzaene kan være nærmere enn du tror. Er du nysgjerrig på å lære mer, vil denne feltguiden vise hvor du kan finne en matbonanza i nærheten av deg.

programme.title: Ville Chile
programme.desc: Chile er en stripe av land fanget mellom fantastiske naturlige grenser. I nord stenger verdens tørreste ørken landet av fra resten av Sør-Amerika. I Atacama-ørkenen har dyrelivet brukt millioner av år på å tilpasse seg et liv uten vann. De som overlever har lært at ingen muligheter kommer uten en viss risiko, men bare de av dyrene i Atacama som tør å ta sjanser, overlever i den mest ugjestmilde ørkenen på jorden.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: Nord i Argentina finnes Ibera-reservatet med sumper, laguner og et like stort biologisk mangfold som i Pantanal.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: Hvaler, pingviner og sjøløver, som føder unger her, er blant sjødyrene som tiltrekkes av Argentinas 5000 km lange kyststripe. Fra første åndedrag er det én ting som gjelder for ungene: å overleve. Spekkhuggere jakter på unge sjøløver med en spesiell teknikk, mens måker angriper hvalungene. Vi får se dyrenes utrolige adferd gjennom noen fantastiske opptak under vann, noe som gjør Christian Baumasters film til en stor visuell opplevelse.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: I Argentinas fantastiske, men tøffe villmark må dyrene kjempe for å overleve hver eneste dag. Terrenget er karrig og ulendt, lufta er tynn og været kan endre seg på et blunk. En puma sniker seg gjennom dalføret på jakt etter en guanako, mens en tarantell forsvarer seg mot et sultent beltedyr. Revene spiser av byttene de finner inntil en stor rovfugl dukker opp. Samtidig holder isbreene på ferskvannet som dyrene så sårt trenger.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: Hvaler, pingviner og sjøløver, som føder unger her, er blant sjødyrene som tiltrekkes av Argentinas 5000 km lange kyststripe. Fra første åndedrag er det én ting som gjelder for ungene: å overleve. Spekkhuggere jakter på unge sjøløver med en spesiell teknikk, mens måker angriper hvalungene. Vi får se dyrenes utrolige adferd gjennom noen fantastiske opptak under vann, noe som gjør Christian Baumasters film til en stor visuell opplevelse.

programme.title: Dyrefikserne: Landsbygdas veterinærer
programme.desc: Dr. Ferguson og Dr. Hodges samarbeider for å redde en kaninunge som har blitt angrepet av familiens katt; legene utfører et keisersnitt på en bulldogg, og sykehuset yrer av aktivitet mens alle hjelper til med å gjenopplive valpene.

programme.title: Ville Argentina
programme.desc: Hvaler, pingviner og sjøløver, som føder unger her, er blant sjødyrene som tiltrekkes av Argentinas 5000 km lange kyststripe. programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Vi reiser fra sør til nord og utforsker de fjerneste avkrokene til Appalachian Trail og møter forskerne som jobber for å bevare området.

programme.title: Dragenes hemmeligheter
programme.desc: Selv om den er et av verdens mest utrolige dyr, er det mye ved komodovaranen som fortsatt er et mysterium. Vi går inn i disse utrolige skapningenes ville verden, og avslører hvordan spesialferdighetene deres og de unike fysiske karakteristikkene lar dem bekjempe rovdyr som er ti ganger større enn dem.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Vi følger med JT Reynolds, Death Valleys store forkjemper, for å møte forskerne som jobber for å bevare det unike stedet.

programme.title: Amerikas ville steder
programme.desc: Canyonlands er en ukjent perle blant USAs nasjonalparker. Det ulendte terrenget er ikke bare vakkert, men også en historiebok.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Ulvene er et av verdens dyktigste rovdyr, og vi ser på hvordan de samarbeider for å finne, isolere og drepe store dyr som bison og moskusokser. Vi følger en arktisk ulveflokk og ser på hvordan de forbereder seg på å drepe før den tøffe vinteren setter in. Lenger sør angriper de grå ulvene bytter som er ti ganger større enn dem selv.

programme.title: Afrikas jegere
programme.desc: Løveungen Milo er en del av Mwambaflokken som regjerer i territoriet på vestsiden av Luangwaelva. De styres av tre brødre og er den største flokken på mils omkrets, så Milo får en god start på livet. I løvenes samfunn er det ungene som holder flokken samlet.

programme.title: Dragenes hemmeligheter
programme.desc: Selv om den er et av verdens mest utrolige dyr, er det mye ved komodovaranen som fortsatt er et mysterium. Vi går inn i disse utrolige skapningenes ville verden, og avslører hvordan spesialferdighetene deres og de unike fysiske karakteristikkene lar dem bekjempe rovdyr som er ti ganger større enn dem.

programme.title: Afrikas jegere
programme.desc: Løveungen Milo er en del av Mwambaflokken som regjerer i territoriet på vestsiden av Luangwaelva. De styres av tre brødre og er den største flokken på mils omkrets, så Milo får en god start på livet. I løvenes samfunn er det ungene som holder flokken samlet.

programme.title: Afrikas jegere
programme.desc: Vi følger en spesiell løveunge som har hatt en tøff oppvekst. Han ble mobbet av storebrødrene og avvist av moren, men den unge løven har nå blitt tenåring.

programme.title: Afrikas jegere
programme.desc: Møt den forkjælede, unge hunnleoparden Chipadzua, som aldri har måttet jakte for å få mat, takket være hennes tålmodige mor. Vil hun utvikle egenskapene som trengs for å overleve når hun nå for første gang er alene i livet?

programme.title: Dragenes hemmeligheter
programme.desc: Selv om den er et av verdens mest utrolige dyr, er det mye ved komodovaranen som fortsatt er et mysterium. Vi går inn i disse utrolige skapningenes ville verden, og avslører hvordan spesialferdighetene deres og de unike fysiske karakteristikkene lar dem bekjempe rovdyr som er ti ganger større enn dem.

programme.title: Alaskas farligste
programme.desc: I Alaska finner vi noen av USAs farligste dyr. Når vinteren er over, finner kjøtteterne fram til elvene og slettene for å få mest mulig sol.

programme.title: Alaskas farligste
programme.desc: I Alaska finner vi noen av USAs farligste dyr. Når vinteren er over, finner kjøtteterne fram til elvene og slettene for å få mest mulig sol.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Vi ser nærmere på overlevelsesevnene til noen av de sterkeste rovdyrene i verden – isbjørner. Følg livene til en mor som sliter med å skaffe mat til de to ungene sine og en ung hann som holder på å sulte ihjel. Vi ser på taktikken disse dyrene bruker for å spore opp, forfølge og angripe bytter som sel, hval og valross.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: Ulvene er et av verdens dyktigste rovdyr, og vi ser på hvordan de samarbeider for å finne, isolere og drepe store dyr som bison og moskusokser. Vi følger en arktisk ulveflokk og ser på hvordan de forbereder seg på å drepe før den tøffe vinteren setter in. Lenger sør angriper de grå ulvene bytter som er ti ganger større enn dem selv.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.desc: Dyrlegene ved PVS tar seg av en rekke sommersår, fra en marsvin med en abscess til et reinsdyr med en uvanlig skorpe. En schæfer med alvorlige flenger og en valp med en øyeskade trenger dr. Nicoles ekspertise. Dr. Pol tar seg av en nedfor ku og en katt som ble påkjørt av en bil. Ti søte valper får kontrollert helsa og en minihest trenger øyeblikkelig hjelp.

programme.title: Den fantastiske dr. Pol
programme.sub-title: En ny dag, et nytt halsbånd
programme.desc: Det er vinter, og hundevalpene strømmer på. Beinskader, cyster og lange negler gir dem mye å gjøre. Dr. Pol tar også imot flere gårdsdyr, som en angusku, samt en chihuahua. Klinikken tar flere prøver av et reinsdyr, rykker ut for å hjelpe en nedkjølt hest og pleier en katt med forstoppelse. Veterinærene viser at de er klare for alt som måtte komme.

programme.title: Veterinærer i Midtvesten
programme.desc: Mens veterinærene Ben og Erin gjør seg klare til å sende sønnen Charlie av gårde til college, blir de ringt opp om en border collie-blanding som har klemt poten i bagasjerommet på en bil. De skynder seg til unnsetning. Ute på en gård redder dr. Ben livet til en kvige som skal kalve, ved å gjøre keisersnitt i felten. Veterinærene fjerner en stor svulst på skuldra til en hund og løser et medisinsk mysterium når fordøyelseskanalen til en hest ikke fungerer som den skal.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa
programme.sub-title: Rhinos, Koalas and Bears... Oh My!
programme.desc: Forelsk deg i asiatiske og australske dyr i Zoo Tampa! I denne spesialepisoden har en malayabjørn time hos tannlegen, et par treleoparder utforsker sitt nye habitat, dyreparken tar farvel med en elsket koala og et neshornpar blir forelsket.
